name: Dr. Ruth's Almost as Good as Sex Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To prepare crust, mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press mixture firmly into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
3. To make filling, beat cream cheese with sugar, vanilla, and salt until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing gently after each addition until well blended.
4. Gently fold in Chambord liqueur.
5. Pour batter into crust.
6. Bake for approximately 40 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan. Let cool and remove rim of pan.
8. To prepare topping, mix sour cream with sugar, vanilla, and Chambord liqueur until smooth.
9. Spread topping evenly over cheesecake.
10. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
11. Top with fresh raspberries just before serving.
